title: Policies — Apply policies using ValidatingAdmissionPolicy
text:
Validating admission policies allow configurable validation checks to be executed in the API server using the Common Expression Language (CEL). For example, a
ValidatingAdmissionPolicy
can be used to disallow use of the
latest
image tag.
A
ValidatingAdmissionPolicy
operates on an API request and can be used to block, audit, and warn users about non-compliant configurations.
Details on the
ValidatingAdmissionPolicy
API, with examples, are documented in a dedicated section:
Validating Admission Policy
